name: KORN FERRY
summary: Korn Ferry is a global consulting firm offering talent and organizational performance solutions. It provides executive search, professional recruiting, RPO, leadership development, organizational consulting, and digital talent products. Its Korn Ferry Talent Suite includes products like Architect, Assess, Pay, Recruit, and Sell. In fiscal 2025, the company generated $2,730.1 million in fee revenue, serving clients across 51 countries through 103 offices.

products.name: Korn Ferry Talent Suite
products.description: Proprietary technology platform embedding IP, data, and analytics into client workflows via subscription and license models.

products.name: Architect
products.description: Digital product within the Korn Ferry Talent Suite for organizational design and job architecture.

products.name: Assess
products.description: Digital assessment product for evaluating talent potential and readiness.

products.name: Pay
products.description: Compensation management product covering pay policy and rewards data.

products.name: Recruit
products.description: Digital recruiting product supporting talent acquisition workflows.

products.name: Sell
products.description: Sales effectiveness product supporting salesforce performance improvement.
